name: maintainer-bar
description: Operate the MaintainerBar SwiftUI menu bar app and its ghcrawl backend for GitHub issue clustering, semantic search, repo pulse, and data-pipeline coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Operate the MaintainerBar SwiftUI menu bar app and its ghcrawl backend for GitHub issue clustering, semantic search, repo pulse, and data-pipeline coordination.
interface.longDescription: Build and run the SwiftUI app, then drive ghcrawl through the ghcrawl-op wrapper in --json mode to refresh, cluster, and semantically search repo issues.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use MaintainerBar — Maintainer Menu Bar Skill safely.
